_comment: Per-NEW-crate cargo-public-api baseline per seq-minor-5 + gap #1a (r2-test-landscape §5 + F2 brief). This file is the seed baseline at R3 stub landing time; the F2 test `ipc_method_name_stability_drift_detector.rs` references this file as the source of truth for the IPC method-name allowlist. The `cargo-public-api` workflow will populate the structured surface entries on the next push that includes the workflow. At R3 RED-PHASE the crate exposes only `placeholder()`; the full surface lands at G24-E wave-7 (TauriRenderer + IpcAllowlist + dispatch_ipc + webview_csp_header + establish_in_process_session).

_ipc_method_name_allowlist_baseline._comment: Drift-detector baseline for the IPC allowlist method-name set, per gap #1a. G24-E wave-7 will populate this list; the F2 test asserts the populated list at HEAD matches this baseline. Adding a method requires an explicit baseline update + manifest review (T3 defense — silent IPC surface expansion is a manifest-bypass risk).
